name: Extra Easy Cherry Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 package (6.25 oz) White Lily Buttermilk Biscuit Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in an 8- or 9-inch square baking dish at a temperature of 350°F.
2. Mix the contents of the biscuit package, sugar, and milk until well combined.
3. Pour the batter evenly into the melted butter.
4. Spoon the pie filling over the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 - 45 minutes or until the top crust is browned.
6. Serve hot.
